File: 00 Inbox/2026-06-02 - reflection loop pattern.md
Content: 'pattern: when something goes wrong, dont just fix it. extract the lesson, write it down, link it. fixes are perishable, lessons compound. saw this in 12h paper repro work too — every failure got captured as a reflexion note.'

reference_output.sharpened: Reflexion loops — extract the lesson, write it down, link it — turn perishable fixes into compounding knowledge, and the pattern shows up in every M3 long-horizon run (paper reproduction, CUDA optimization) where every failure becomes a captured note.
